title: Save and edit records for all portal app sections

requirements.summary: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Membership records
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the create dialog persists a new membership record to the backend canister.
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields (name, email).
A success toast is shown and the dialog closes on successful save.
The membership list refreshes automatically after creation.
Backend errors are surfaced to the user inline.

file_operations.description: Wire the existing create dialog form to the createMembershipProfile mutation hook. Add form validation to prevent submission when name or email fields are empty. On successful mutation, show a success toast using the toast API, close the dialog, and trigger a query invalidation to refresh the membership list. Display backend errors inline within the dialog form.

requirements.summary: Implement an inline edit form on MembershipDetail for modifying profile fields
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an Edit button on MembershipDetail opens an editable form pre-populated with current values.
Saving persists changes to the backend and the page reflects the updated data immediately.
Only the record owner or an admin sees the Edit button.
A success toast is shown on successful save; backend errors are displayed inline.

file_operations.description: Add an Edit Profile button (visible only when canEditMembership returns true) that opens an inline editable form or dialog pre-populated with current name, email, and status values. Wire the form to the updateMembership mutation hook from useQueries.ts. On successful save, show a success toast, close the edit UI, and the page will reflect updated data via automatic query invalidation. Display backend errors inline within the edit form.

requirements.summary: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Publishing Work records
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the create dialog persists a new publishing work to the backend.
Title is required; submission is blocked if it is empty.
Success toast is shown and dialog closes after a successful save.
The publishing works list refreshes automatically.
Backend errors are surfaced inline.

file_operations.description: Wire the existing create dialog form to the createPublishingWork mutation hook. Add validation to block submission when the title field is empty. On successful mutation, show a success toast, close the dialog, and trigger query invalidation to refresh the works list. Display backend errors inline within the dialog.

requirements.summary: Implement an inline edit form on PublishingWorkDetail for modifying work fields
acceptanceCriteria: An Edit button (visible to owner or admin) opens a form pre-populated with current field values.
Ownership split validation (total ≤ 100%) is enforced before submission.
Changes persist to the backend and the detail page updates without a full reload.
Success toast on save; inline error display on failure.

file_operations.description: Add an Edit Work button (visible only when canEditPublishingWork returns true) that opens an inline editable form or dialog pre-populated with current title, registration status, contributors, ownership splits, and notes. Wire the form to the updatePublishingWork mutation hook. Validate ownership splits using the existing validation utility to ensure total ≤ 100%. On successful save, show a success toast, close the edit UI, and the page will reflect updated data via query invalidation. Display backend errors inline.

requirements.summary: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Release records
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the create dialog persists a new release record to the backend.
Title and type are required; submission is blocked if either is empty.
Success toast shown and dialog closes after successful save.
Releases list refreshes automatically.
Backend errors are surfaced inline.

file_operations.description: Wire the existing create dialog form to the createRelease mutation hook. Add validation to block submission when title or releaseType fields are empty. On successful mutation, show a success toast, close the dialog, and trigger query invalidation to refresh the releases list. Display backend errors inline within the dialog.

requirements.summary: Implement an inline edit form on ReleaseDetail for modifying release fields
acceptanceCriteria: An Edit button (visible to owner or admin) opens a form pre-populated with existing values.
All editable fields update in the backend on save.
The detail page reflects changes immediately after saving.
Success toast on save; inline error display on failure.

file_operations.description: Add an Edit Release button (visible only when canEditRelease returns true) that opens an inline editable form or dialog pre-populated with current title, release type, tracklist, key dates, and workflow checklist. Wire the form to the updateRelease mutation hook. On successful save, show a success toast, close the edit UI, and the page will reflect updated data via query invalidation. Display backend errors inline.

requirements.summary: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Recording Project records
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the create dialog persists a new recording project to the backend.
Required fields are validated before submission.
Success toast shown and dialog closes after successful save.
Project list refreshes automatically.
Backend errors are surfaced inline.

file_operations.description: Wire the existing create dialog form to the createRecordingProject mutation hook. Add validation to ensure required fields (title, participants, sessionDate, status, notes) are present before submission. On successful mutation, show a success toast, close the dialog, and trigger query invalidation to refresh the project list. Display backend errors inline within the dialog.

requirements.summary: Implement an inline edit form on RecordingProjectDetail for modifying project fields
acceptanceCriteria: An Edit button (visible to owner or admin) opens a form pre-populated with current values.
Changes persist to the backend on save.
Detail page updates immediately after saving.
Success toast on save; inline error display on failure.

file_operations.description: Add an Edit Project button (visible only when canEditRecordingProject returns true) that opens an inline editable form or dialog pre-populated with current title, participants, sessionDate, status, and notes. Wire the form to the updateRecordingProject mutation hook. On successful save, show a success toast, close the edit UI, and the page will reflect updated data via query invalidation. Display backend errors inline.

requirements.summary: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Artist Development records
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the create dialog persists a new artist development entry to the backend.
Required fields are validated before submission.
Success toast shown and dialog closes after successful save.
Artist development list refreshes automatically.
Backend errors are surfaced inline.

file_operations.description: Wire the existing create dialog form to the createArtistDevelopment mutation hook. Add validation to ensure required fields (artistId, goals, plans, milestones, internalNotes) are present before submission. On successful mutation, show a success toast, close the dialog, and trigger query invalidation to refresh the artist development list. Display backend errors inline within the dialog.

requirements.summary: Implement an inline edit form on ArtistDevelopmentDetail for modifying entry fields
acceptanceCriteria: An Edit button (visible to owner or admin) opens a form pre-populated with current values.
Changes persist to the backend on save.
Detail page updates immediately after saving.
Success toast on save; inline error display on failure.

file_operations.description: Add an Edit Entry button (visible only when canEditArtistDevelopment returns true) that opens an inline editable form or dialog pre-populated with current goals, plans, milestones, and internalNotes arrays. Wire the form to the updateArtistDevelopment mutation hook. On successful save, show a success toast, close the edit UI, and the page will reflect updated data via query invalidation. Display backend errors inline.

requirements.summary: Add React Query mutation hooks for all five entity update operations
acceptanceCriteria: Each mutation hook is exported from useQueries.ts.
On success, the hook invalidates the corresponding list and detail queries so UI reflects the latest data.
Mutation errors are propagated to callers for inline display.

file_operations.description: Add five new mutation hooks: useUpdateMembership, useUpdatePublishingWork, useUpdateRelease, useUpdateRecordingProject, and useUpdateArtistDevelopment. Each hook should call the corresponding backend update method (updateMembership, updatePublishingWork, updateRelease, updateRecordingProject, updateArtistDevelopment) and invalidate both the list query (e.g., 'memberships', 'publishingWorks') and the detail query (e.g., ['membership', id], ['publishingWork', id]) on success. Ensure mutation errors are returned to callers for inline display in forms.
